name: Beef Stew Bourguignonne
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Beef stew meat (cut in 1-inch cubes)
1 can Golden mushroom soup (10 3/4-ounce can condensed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the meat in hot oil; drain.
2. Transfer the meat to a crockery cooker.
3. Stir in soup, onion, carrot, wine, mushrooms, oregano, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Cover and cook on low-heat setting for 10 to 12 hours.
5. Turn off the cooker and set it to high-heat setting.
6. Blend 1/2 cup cold water slowly into flour; stir into the beef mixture.
7. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
8. Serve the beef mixture over hot cooked noodles.
Serves 6 Better Homes and Gardens Crockery Cooker
